meta.title: Gianlucca Vidotto
meta.description: Software Developer & Data Engineer based in São Paulo.

about.name: Gianlucca Vidotto
about.bio: CS student at UNIFESP. I build scalable systems, automate data pipelines, and ship full-stack products end to end. Based in São Paulo, Brazil.

bullets: Built an automated Python ETL pipeline that eliminated ~6h/week of manual spreadsheet consolidation, enabling daily-refreshed managerial reports.
Developed interactive Power BI dashboards centralizing 10+ KPIs — sales targets, operational metrics and team performance — with real-time data sync.
Designed and maintained a normalized MySQL database ensuring full referential integrity and audit-ready reporting.
Built the company website end-to-end with React + Node.js, integrated third-party APIs and improved page-load performance.

projects.title: ETL Data Pipeline — Terapia Beer
projects.description: End-to-end automated pipeline in Python: extracts raw sales and operational data, transforms with business rules, and loads into a normalized MySQL database — replacing 6h/week of manual work with daily auto-refreshed Power BI dashboards.

projects.title: Terapia Beer — Web Platform
projects.description: Full-stack institutional website. React frontend, Node.js API, third-party integrations and optimized load performance.
